name: Aberrant Devour
descriptionTemplate:
The Base DMG of the wielder's Exalt +[StateArg1]%.
At the start of investigation, the wielder's Scholar alter begins to front. After the wielder Exalts, they switch between Scholar and Jester.
{Scholar}—The wielder gains [StateArg2] Aliemus at the end of each turn.
{Jester}—The wielder's Crit. Rate & Crit. DMG +[StateArg3]% at the end of each turn.
lore:
A.F.@1/06/05
Albinor brought back some rare Silvers from the D-Rift. Truly impressive.
I made some improvements to the purification method.
This time, I introduced a sufficient amount of carbon dioxide and chlorine gas, followed by low-temperature evaporation and crystallization...
These mechanical steps aren't worth recording in detail.

A.F.@1/06/06
I dissected the internal organs and limbs of specimen 024.
This material was brought back by Albinor from the clinic and has generated 13 dissolution holes, with a maximum diameter of 8mm.
Cutting the parasitic organisms of the OS-106 D-Rift monster.
According to the comparison of various test data, it shows the highest resonance compatibility with 024.
The only issue is... those tentacles are a bit too "lively."
I think I won't want to eat octopus for a long time.
I hope the final result doesn't disappoint me.

@1 Year 6 Month 6 Day
The grafting experiment succeeded, but the vital signs of the specimen disappeared.
This is a common occurrence; we just need to ensure that the grafting site hasn't spread infection.
Sent for a week of observation—what follows won't be my responsibility anymore.
Today, I read two articles criticizing living Awakener experiments in the "Internal Journal."
Needless to say, the signatures reveal they are my old friends from Mythag.
It's laughable—if these old fogeys would just move their hefty butts and visit the lab, they'd know my conclusions are unshakable.
The experiment with 024 will serve as an excellent counterattack.

A.F.@1/06/22
Two weeks have passed, and the vital signs of 024 remain unstable—or rather, the personality within her is dividing and multiplying rapidly like cellular mitosis.
The experiment has failed in an astonishing manner.
Send 024 to the wax museum; I don't need her following me daily, reminding me of my foolishness and rashness.
